'''''Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 9: Endgame''''' is the ninth and final volume in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars (trade paperbacks)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'']] series of [[Star Wars comic books|trade paperbacks]]. Volume 9 collects ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' issues 79-83 and [[Purge (comic book)|''Purge'']]. It was published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[July 26]], [[2006]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Witness the untold stories of the Jedi who took a last stand against Emperor Palpatine in the moments during, and immediately after, the events in Revenge of the Sith! Watch Darth Vader undertake a Jedi "purge" of his own in the hunt for Obi-Wan Kenobi!''

''In the jungles of the Wookiee homeworld Kashyyyk, Quinlan Vos wages a battle of impossible odds against his own troops to protect his loved ones. On the icy Outer Rim world of Toola, Jedi Master Kai Huddora takes a terrified Padawan into his charge after her own master falls to Order 66. Amidst the forests of New Plympto, Dass Jennir finds himself in league with a band of rebels he'd led attacks against only days before. Not all Jedi are scattered across the galaxy however, and soon, a brave few will plot to topple Sith rule-by setting a trap for the newly unveiled Darth Vader!''
